Fields.Name: Condition: Indoor/Outdoor
Fields.Description: Condition: Indoor / outdoor designation (0: outdoor, 1: indoor) (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Condition: Evaluation Distance A
Fields.Description: Condition: Evaluation distance number A to use (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Condition: Evaluation Distance B
Fields.Description: Condition: Evaluation distance number B to be used (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Condition: Evaluation Distance A - Min
Fields.Description: Condition: For evaluation distance minimum specification A (less than 0: invalid)

Fields.Name: Condition: Evaluation Distance A - Max
Fields.Description: Condition: For evaluation distance maximum specification A (less than 0: invalid)

Fields.Name: Condition: Evaluation Distance B - Min
Fields.Description: Condition: For evaluation distance minimum specification A (less than 0: invalid)

Fields.Name: Condition: Evaluation Distance B - Max
Fields.Description: Condition: For evaluation distance maximum specification A (less than 0: invalid)
